visual_description: A man is shown from behind, standing on what appears to be a balcony or walkway at night. He is wearing a light-colored, possibly white, button-down shirt with the sleeves rolled up and dark trousers. He holds onto a metal railing with his right hand. In front of him, a large, translucent plastic sheet, possibly from a tarp or a large bag, is caught in the wind and billows violently. The background is dark and indistinct, with the faint lights of a city visible in the distance. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot focused on the man and the plastic sheet. In the top left corner of the screen, there is a watermark with Chinese characters that read "风行网". The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful musical score. A low, ominous, and resonant drone creates a feeling of unease and anticipation. Layered over this is a slow, melancholic melody played by what sounds like a string instrument, adding a somber and dramatic weight to the scene. The overall mood is one of quiet dread and foreboding, suggesting that something significant or unsettling is about to happen. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the music to dominate the atmosphere.
